summary: No GitHub mutations are planned. The preflight artifact could not hydrate any of the 10 PRs because GitHub returned installation API rate-limit HTTP 403 errors, so bodies, comments, review comments, checks, merge state, and file diffs are unavailable. Because this inventory shard has no shared canonical and low-signal/instant close/fix/merge paths are disabled, each non-security PR requires a refreshed hydration pass before an auditable classification. #87800 is routed to central security handling because deterministic validation identified it as security-sensitive.
